shopping_159.POSSIBLE REASONS FOR FAILURE: The agent successfully identified the item as a "blue throw blanket" and added one to the wish list. However, the objective specified "in a similar color" to the blanket in the image, which is a solid, vibrant teal/aqua blue. The chosen blanket was an "Ombre Throw Fuzzy Lightweight Blanket" with a striped blue/grey/white pattern, which does not closely match the specific color and solid pattern of the blanket in the objective image. The agent failed to prioritize the visual similarity of the specific hue and pattern when selecting an item.
shopping_159.REFLECTION: When the objective requires finding an item "in a similar color," it is crucial to pay close attention to the specific shade, hue, and pattern of the item in the reference image. Do not just rely on a broad color category (e.g., "blue"). Visually compare the reference image with the product images in the search results to find the closest match in terms of color, pattern, and texture. If initial search results are not a good match, refine the search query with more specific color descriptors (e.g., "teal fuzzy blanket") or explore more results.
